education.details: Fashion Designer, Richard Robinson Academy of Fashion Design (2000)
Fashion Coordination & Stylist, Richard Robinson Academy (2002–2004)

skills_and_achievements: Color iQc, PLM, Adobe Illustrator/Photoshop, MS Office/Lotus Notes; trend analysis, seasonal palette creation, denim/woven shade bands, dye/trim limitations, Pantone cross-matches, YKK/IDEAL zipper & Coats/AE thread matching; vendor training; equipment/UV calibration; led Athleta ($565M) color program; implemented U3500 light source for evaluations.
